creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
I was trying to get it commited, but:

[~/cvs/ports/net-mgmt/netxms] root@build5>make
=> netxms-0.2.21.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /var/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://nchc.dl.sourceforge.net/sourceforge/netxms/.
fetch: http://nchc.dl.sourceforge.net/sourceforge/netxms/netxms-0.2.21.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 4759980, actual 5338241

Any chance that you can find out what goes wrong here?

-- 
Edwin Groothuis      |            Personal website: http://www.mavetju.org
edwin@mavetju.org    |              Weblog: http://www.mavetju.org/weblog/
